title: zendesk-asset-sync
pitch: Sync Zendesk tickets with a simple asset inventory model and status automations.
keyFeatures: Type-safe Zendesk client for tickets, users, and organizations
Asset-to-ticket linking via custom fields and tags
Rules engine for auto-updating asset status from ticket events
Import/export assets as CSV/JSON for non-technical staff
targetUsers: IT support teams and devs building Zendesk-based school or SMB helpdesks with basic asset tracking.
